title: T-011 — Playwright E2E happy-path: full wizard <15min P50
prompt:
Author a Playwright E2E test exercising the full SET-001..SET-007 onboarding flow per PRD §14.3 (6-step <15min P50 target on KPI line 57).

Flow:
1. Sign in as a freshly created org owner (factory creates org with default onboarding_state).
2. Visit `/` — assert redirect to /onboarding/1 (T-004 launcher).
3. Submit valid Org Profile (T-005) → assert /onboarding/2.
4. Submit valid Warehouse (T-006) → assert /onboarding/3.
5. Submit valid Location (T-007) → assert /onboarding/4.
6. Click Skip on step 4 (T-008) → assert /onboarding/5.
7. Click Skip on step 5 (T-009) → assert /onboarding/6.
8. Assert page contains 3 next-step cards (T-010).
9. Capture `started_at` and `last_activity_at` from DB; assert delta <15min.

RED: `pnpm --filter web test:e2e -- onboarding-happy-path`.

pipeline_inputs.description: End-to-end Playwright test covering all 6 steps + KPI assertion.
pipeline_inputs.details: Spec lives in apps/web/e2e/onboarding-happy-path.spec.ts. Uses factory helper to seed an org with default onboarding_state. Asserts navigation, state mutations, and timing delta.
out_of_scope: P95 timing edge case (kpi line 57 also has <30min P95 — defer to perf suite)
acceptance_criteria: Given a freshly created org, when the spec runs through all 6 step interactions, then every navigation assertion passes and final URL is /onboarding/6.
Given the spec completes, when DB is queried for the org's onboarding_state, then completed_steps ⊇ [1,2,3,6] AND skipped_steps ⊇ [4,5] AND current_step=6.
Given started_at and last_activity_at recorded, when computed, then last_activity_at - started_at < 15 minutes.
Given the spec runs in CI via pnpm --filter web test:e2e, when finished, then exit code 0 with the spec named onboarding-happy-path.
test_strategy: Author the spec first (RED) against an unimplemented stack — expect failures.
After T-004..T-010 land, re-run; spec turns GREEN.
risk_red_lines: Do not stub backend in this E2E — must hit real DB via test factories.
Do not assert P95<30min here — that belongs to a perf suite.
